node.text:
If Osaka is on your Japan itinerary 🇯🇵

These are 5 places worth making time for!

Osaka is one of those cities that just feels fun the moment you arrive. We spent our days wandering through Dotonbori at night, eating our way through Kuromon Market, and ending the day in Shinsekai near Tsutenkaku Tower. 🐙

If you’re planning a trip to Osaka or dreaming about your first time in Japan in 2026, these are the places we’d genuinely recommend! 

Save this Osaka travel guide for your trip ✈️

Which spot would you visit first? Let us know 👇

⸻
#osakatravel #osaka #japantrip 
#japanfood #dotonbori

Tokyo ➡️ Osaka 

Where should we feature next? Let us know 🙌
